overall.description: Gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character walking along a wooden harbor dock at sunset. The scene transitions from a peaceful waterfront with sailing ships to an industrial area with cranes, warehouses, and railroad tracks, ending in a factory yard with smokestacks.

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden dock toward the harbor, observing the sailing ships moored in the calm water

weathered wooden planks forming the dock walkway
large green-painted wooden warehouse building with multiple windows
calm water of the harbor reflecting the boats and sky
vertical wooden posts along the edge of the dock

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a peaceful harbor scene during golden hour, with the camera walking along a wooden dock. Two red-hulled sailing ships are moored in the calm water to the left, while a large green warehouse building lines the right side of the dock.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial dock with cargo cranes and steamboat

events.description: turning from open waterfront toward industrial dock area with machinery and cranes

agents.ego_description: walking along the dock past industrial cranes and cargo loading equipment

entered.detail: large wooden cargo crane with pulley system for loading ships
tall industrial chimneys emitting black smoke in the distance
steam-powered vessel with tall smokestack moored at the dock
stacked wooden cargo barrels along the warehouse wall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an industrial dock area as the camera turns away from the open water. Large cargo cranes and a steamboat come into view, while factory smokestacks become visible in the background. The green warehouse now dominates the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: warehouse dock with cargo sacks and workers

events.description: passing by dock workers and laborers along the warehouse wall

agents.ego_description: walking past dock workers and cargo storage along the green warehouse wall

burlap sacks of cargo piled against the warehouse wall
metal railroad tracks crossing the dock ahead

segments.scene_description: Walking along the narrow dock passage between the green warehouse and the water, the camera passes wooden crates and cargo sacks. A dock worker walks toward the camera, and in the distance, railroad tracks and a red shack become visible as the industrial area continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial rail yard with canning company building

events.description: crossing railroad tracks into the industrial yard with factory buildings

agents.ego_description: crossing the railroad tracks and entering the industrial complex with factory workers nearby

notable_agents.action: two workers standing and conversing near the red shack entrance

entered.detail: tall wooden plank fence lining the left side of the yard
large industrial factory building with 'CANNING COMPANY' signage

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the railroad tracks into a wide industrial yard. The Canning Company factory building dominates the background with multiple smokestacks, while workers stand near a red shack. The scene opens up from the narrow dock into a spacious industrial complex.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a peaceful golden-hour harbor into a sprawling industrial factory complex. It begins by walking along a wooden dock beside calm waters where red-hulled sailing ships are moored next to a large green warehouse. As the camera turns away from the open water, the scene shifts toward an industrial dock area where cargo cranes, a steamboat, and distant smokestacks emerge. The view then narrows into a passage between the warehouse and the waterfront, passing wooden crates and a dock worker before railroad tracks and a red shack appear ahead. Finally, the camera crosses the tracks as the environment opens up into a wide industrial yard dominated by the Canning Company factory and its towering smokestacks.
